meta.title: Book Now | Taibah Valley
meta.description: Book workspaces, Innovation Avenue, and work halls at Taibah Valley with clear morning and evening booking periods.
meta.keywords: Taibah Valley, book now, work halls, workspaces, Innovation Avenue, Madinah

labels.siteHome: Go to Taibah Valley home page
labels.contentError: Page content could not be loaded.

hero.title: Flexible spaces for ideas in motion
hero.description: Choose the right space for your experience at Taibah Valley, from workspaces to Innovation Avenue and work halls, then complete your request through the official booking platform.

options.title: Choose the right space
options.description: Each card takes visitors directly to the official booking form. Review the available periods and choose the most suitable time before submitting.

items.title: Workspaces
items.description: Prepared spaces for individual work, group collaboration, and quick meetings inside an innovation-focused environment.
items.ariaLabel: Book workspaces through the official booking form

items.title: Innovation Avenue
items.description: A suitable space for innovation meetups, showcases, and experiences that need flexible attendance.
items.ariaLabel: Book Innovation Avenue through the official booking form

items.title: Work Halls
items.description: Dedicated halls for meetings, workshops, and activities that need an organized setup.
items.ariaLabel: Book work halls through the official booking form

note.title: Important note
note.body: To confirm your booking, the booking request must be submitted at least three days before the scheduled date.

footer.blurb: Madinah's innovation hub, supporting startups, research, investment, and digital transformation.
